source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Panoramic Photographs Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain)
title: Whittier, Alaska, Sept. 1957
description: 1957 panoramic of military-era Whittier from the hills above, showing the full town layout along Passage Canal with Chugach Mountains surrounding the harbor. Whittier was built as a military port during WWII.
alt: 1957 panoramic photograph of Whittier, Alaska showing the military-era town along Passage Canal with Chugach Mountains surrounding the harbor
